questions.question: What is the atomic unit of a knowledge graph?
questions.explanation: KGs store information as (s, r, o) triples; aggregated triples form the graph.
questions.question_zh: 知识图谱的原子单元是什么？
questions.explanation_zh: KG 把信息存成 (s, r, o) 三元组，三元组聚合成图。

questions.question: What does AEVS stand for in 2026 relation extraction?
options: Anchor-Extraction-Verification-Supplement: anchor spans, extract triples, verify against source, supplement coverage
questions.explanation: AEVS is the 2026 hallucination-mitigation framework for grounded RE.
questions.question_zh: 在 2026 年的关系抽取里，AEVS 代表什么？
options_zh: Anchor-Extraction-Verification-Supplement：先锚定 span，再抽取三元组，对照原文校验，最后补全覆盖
questions.explanation_zh: AEVS 是 2026 年用于 grounded RE 的幻觉抑制框架。

questions.question: Why must each triple carry source provenance (doc id + span)?
options: Provenance lets you audit triples and reject hallucinations whose spans do not match the source text
questions.explanation: Provenance enables auditing and is the core of AEVS-style hallucination detection.
questions.question_zh: 为什么每个三元组都要带 source provenance（doc id 加 span）？
options_zh: 有 provenance 才能审计三元组、拒绝那些 span 与原文不一致的幻觉
questions.explanation_zh: Provenance 让审计成为可能，是 AEVS 风格幻觉检测的核心。

questions.question: What does canonicalization of relations do?
options: Maps surface verb phrases (e.g. 'was born in', 'is a native of') onto a fixed property id so the graph is queryable
questions.explanation: Canonicalization collapses paraphrases into canonical KG property ids.
questions.question_zh: 关系的 canonicalization 是做什么的？
options_zh: 把表面动词短语（如 'was born in'、'is a native of'）映射到固定的属性 id，让图变得可查询
questions.explanation_zh: Canonicalization 把同义说法收敛到 KG 里规范的 property id。

questions.question: Why does relation extraction usually need coreference resolution first?
options: Pronouns like 'he founded Apple' must be resolved to a named entity before triple extraction
questions.explanation: Without coref, RE attaches relations to pronouns instead of the underlying named entity.
questions.question_zh: 为什么关系抽取通常要先做共指消解？
options_zh: 像 'he founded Apple' 里的代词必须先解析到具名实体，才能抽出三元组
questions.explanation_zh: 不做共指，RE 会把关系挂到代词上而不是底层的具名实体。

questions.question: Which choice trades open IE recall for graph queryability?
options: Mapping open-IE relations onto a closed ontology (e.g. Wikidata properties) before merging into the KG
questions.explanation: Closed ontologies make the graph queryable; the canonicalization step pays for itself downstream.
questions.question_zh: 哪种选择是用 open IE 的 recall 换图的可查询性？
options_zh: 把 open-IE 的关系映射到封闭本体（比如 Wikidata 属性），再合并入 KG
questions.explanation_zh: 封闭本体让图可查询；canonicalization 步骤的成本会在下游回本。

questions.question: Why do many production KGs use temporal qualifiers (start/end time)?
options: Many relations are time-bounded (employer, spouse, role); qualifiers prevent 'forever true' claims that go stale
questions.explanation: Time-bounded relations need qualifiers (e.g. Wikidata P580/P582) or facts go silently stale.
questions.question_zh: 为什么很多生产 KG 都用时间限定符（开始/结束时间）？
options_zh: 很多关系都是有时效的（雇主、配偶、职位），限定符避免出现 “永远成立” 的过期事实
用来去掉 NIL 实体
questions.explanation_zh: 有时效的关系需要限定符（比如 Wikidata 的 P580/P582），否则事实会悄悄过期。

questions.question: What is REBEL?
options: A seq2seq relation extractor that outputs triples already in Wikidata property ids
questions.explanation: REBEL (Babelscape) is a seq2seq RE model trained on distantly supervised Wikidata triples.
options_zh: 一个 seq2seq 关系抽取器，输出已经是 Wikidata property id 的三元组
questions.explanation_zh: REBEL（Babelscape）是一个 seq2seq RE 模型，在远监督的 Wikidata 三元组上训练。
